query_intent: Compare customer-item coverage between store and catalog channels over month sequence 1214-1225 by counting store-only, catalog-only, and overlapping customer-item pairs.

dag_nodes.intent: Build distinct customer-item pairs from store sales in the 12-month window.
Build distinct customer-item pairs from catalog sales in the same window.
Full-outer-join store and catalog pair sets on customer-item and count membership in each exclusive/overlap bucket.
